data.description:
## Story
6441-3168: auto-detect runner mode

## Goal
Make the two RED tests (be41-22ee) pass by implementing _resolve_plugin_root() and creating the marker file.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh
- plugins/dso/.dso-source-of-truth (create empty file)

## Implementation

### 1. Create marker file
Create an empty file at plugins/dso/.dso-source-of-truth
This file identifies the DSO plugin's own source checkout (vs host-project CI).

### 2. Add _resolve_plugin_root() to ci-llm-review-runner.sh
Insert AFTER the existing _PLUGIN_ROOT assignment line (line 5: _PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-...}"):

```bash
_resolve_plugin_root() {
  local _repo_root
  _repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [[ -n "$_repo_root" && -f "$_repo_root/plugins/dso/.dso-source-of-truth" ]]; then
    return 0
  fi
  if [[ -z "${DSO_ASSETS_DIR:-}" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: DSO_ASSETS_DIR must be set for host-project CI (marker file not found)" >&2
    return 1
  fi
  _PLUGIN_ROOT="$DSO_ASSETS_DIR"
}
_resolve_plugin_root || exit 1
```

The function:
- Detects local checkout via the .dso-source-of-truth marker at repo root
- Falls back to DSO_ASSETS_DIR for host-project CI
- Fails with a clear error if neither applies

## Acceptance Criteria
- DD1: Running in DSO repo (marker file exists) → _PLUGIN_ROOT unchanged from BASH_SOURCE resolution
- DD2: Running in host-project CI (no marker) with DSO_ASSETS_DIR set → _PLUGIN_ROOT=DSO_ASSETS_DIR
- DD3: Running in host-project CI with no marker and no DSO_ASSETS_DIR → exit 1 with ERROR message
- DD4: Both tests from be41-22ee now PASS (GREEN)

## Testing Mode
testing_mode: GREEN
data.title: Implement _resolve_plugin_root() in ci-llm-review-runner.sh and create .dso-source-of-truth marker
